recommendations.title: Beating Hearts
recommendations.overview: Local rebellious teenager Clotaire falls for his schoolmate Jackie, but gang violence leads him to a darker destructive path. After years apart, the star-crossed lovers discover that every path they've taken leads them back together.

recommendations.title: Narco
recommendations.overview: Gustave Klopp suffers from narcolepsy, he can fall asleep everwhere at anytime whithout warning. Living a simple life with his wife Pam and his best friend Lenny Bar, Gus decides to undergo therapy sessions and finds out that he can make incredible c

recommendations.title: Les Misérables
recommendations.overview: In 19th century France, Jean Valjean, a man imprisoned for stealing bread, must flee a relentless policeman named Javert. The pursuit consumes both men's lives, and soon Valjean finds himself in the midst of the student revolutions in France.

recommendations.title: How to Have Sex
recommendations.overview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.

recommendations.title: 22 Minutes
recommendations.overview: 22 minutes got Russian marine to free a hijacked oil tanker far from shore.

recommendations.title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
recommendations.overview: A sprawling drama centered on five key days in a family's life.

recommendations.title: Sink or Swim
recommendations.overview: 40-year-old Bertrand has been suffering from depression for the last two years and is barely able to keep his head above water. Despite the medication he gulps down all day, every day, and his wife's encouragement, he is unable to find any meaning in

recommendations.title: Fatima
recommendations.overview: Fatima, an Algerian-born woman who now lives in France with her two teenage daughters, with whom she is barely able to communicate.

recommendations.title: Stranger by the Lake
recommendations.overview: Frank spends his summer days hopelessly searching for companionship at a popular cruising spot on the shores of a lake in rural France. One day, he meets Michel, an attractive yet darkly mysterious man and falls blindly in love.

recommendations.title: According to Greta
recommendations.overview: Dumped on her grandparents for the summer by her indifferent mother, acerbic and self-destructive teenager Greta disrupts the elderly couple's staid life on the Jersey Shore. Eventually, a romance helps Greta face down her demons.
